case_title: ALEJANDRO C MALTEZ VS. BORIS H ASCENCIO DIAZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-30-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEJANDRO C MALTEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BORIS H ASCENCIO DIAZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
